reasoning: As of late October 2025, with barely two months remaining until the question resolves on December 31, 2025, there is no evidence that four of the Magnificent Seven currently are—or have been at any point since late 2023—down 50% from their absolute all-time highs. A drop of 50% for three additional mega-cap stocks in just two months would require an unprecedented financial collapse, far beyond typical market corrections. The true probability is negligible (near 0-1%), but given the forecasting guidelines to bound estimates between 0.05 and 0.95, I am setting the probability at the absolute allowed floor of 0.05.
